description_long: This is a white racing coupe car adorned with Castrol branding and racing decals, including the number 36 on the doors, hood, and rear. The car features a prominent rear wing spoiler, aerodynamic bodywork, and low-profile tires on multi-spoke alloy wheels. The exterior is decorated with green and red stripes, sponsor logos, and detailed livery typical of a professional race car. The windows are tinted black, and the car has a two-door configuration with a sloped roofline and wide fenders. The front end is equipped with a low splitter and integrated headlights, while the rear showcases a large diffuser and dual exhausts. The overall design emphasizes speed, performance, and motorsport aesthetics.
description: A white, Castrol-liveried racing coupe car with a large rear wing, racing decals, and aerodynamic bodywork. It features two doors, tinted windows, and detailed sponsor graphics.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the large Castrol-branded wing, rear bumper, taillights, and racing number 36.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the two-door coupe profile, Castrol graphics, alloy wheels, and racing decals.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the low splitter, integrated headlights, hood decals, and aggressive stance.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible sponsor logos, number 36, and aerodynamic features.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
